title: PF_BacklightBrightness Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub PF_BacklightBrightness (FeederNumber As Integer, Brightness As Integer)
parameters:
FeederNumber	Integer number representing the feeder
		 number

Brightness	The percentage of brightness from 0
		 to 100%.
description: Sets the brightness for the built-in backlight.
notes:
Normally, the built-in backlight brightness to be used for a part is set in the Part Feeding Configuration dialog. If changes to brightness are required at runtime, you can use this command to change it.

PF_BacklightBrightnesst
